value.found_quote: Codex custom instructions doc to read: Custom instructions with AGENTS.md – Codex | OpenAI Developers
value.rationale: The page describes Codex allowing storage of instructions per repo and globally, and explicitly references "Custom instructions with AGENTS.md – Codex | OpenAI Developers," substantiating that OpenAI's Codex persists project context via an AGENTS.md file. No lifecycle limitation is mentioned, so it is presented as active.
